description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for accessing AuditEvent entities, including custom query methods for filtering audit logs by various criteria.

classes.name: AuditEventRepository
classes.description: Repository interface extending JpaRepository for performing CRUD operations and custom queries on AuditEvent entities.

methods.name: findAllByCreatedAtBetween
methods.description: Retrieves a paginated list of AuditEvent objects created between specified timestamps.

methods.name: findAllByUserIdAndCreatedAtBetween
methods.description: Retrieves a paginated list of AuditEvent objects for a specific user within a specified time range.

methods.name: findAllByEventTypeAndCreatedAtBetween
methods.description: Retrieves a paginated list of AuditEvent objects of a specific type within a given time span.

methods.name: findAllByEventTypeAndUserIdAndCreatedAtBetween
methods.description: Retrieves a paginated list of AuditEvent objects matching a specific event type and user ID within a time range.
